findings.observation: every run emits scenario-start (and the engine emits scenario-end on victory) — exercised in 100/100 replays
every run emits at least one turn-start — exercised in 100/100 replays
parties actually move (party-moved events emitted) — exercised in 100/100 replays
opposing-faction collisions trigger battles — exercised in 100/100 replays
POSTs change ownership during the run — exercised in 100/100 replays
leader-died fires when a battle kills a party leader — exercised in 100/100 replays
queen ultimate charge accrues over the scenario — exercised in 100/100 replays
queen ultimate is fired at least once across the batch — NEVER observed across 100 replays
findings.suggested_action: either the rule is unimplemented, the rule is implemented but unreachable in current play, or the AIs never trigger the conditions that would fire it

findings.observation: royal jelly is consumed at least once across the batch — NEVER observed across 100 replays
findings.suggested_action: either the rule is unimplemented, the rule is implemented but unreachable in current play, or the AIs never trigger the conditions that would fire it

findings.observation: PheroBlast (or any ability) is used at least once across the batch — exercised in 100/100 replays
fog of war reveals tiles as parties move — NEVER observed across 100 replays
findings.suggested_action: either the rule is unimplemented, the rule is implemented but unreachable in current play, or the AIs never trigger the conditions that would fire it

findings.observation: at least one run reaches scenario-end (a decisive outcome) — NEVER observed across 100 replays
findings.suggested_action: either the rule is unimplemented, the rule is implemented but unreachable in current play, or the AIs never trigger the conditions that would fire it
